name: Corporate Treasury Statement Reconciliation
outcome: Linear two-step chain for TMS straight-through reconciliation. Step 1 classifies ISO 20022 camt.053 BkTxCd entries (Domain/Family/SubFamily per CGI-MP v5.0), validates the OPBD+sum(movements)=CLBD balance equation, and scores structured-remittance match rate. Step 2 scores AFP 2024 MAPE and timing-bias of cash forecasts against the reconciled actual transaction amounts, closing the TMS forecast-vs-actual cycle. ZERO PII BY CONSTRUCTION.
